sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114895" key="xrusoko/rallos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρυσο-κόραλλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114895.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">'gold-coral',</tr_> name of several metals, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.44B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.44B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
